caption: Role
description: The Role object describes permission characteristics associated with a user or group of users against one or more resources. In some cases only the name or ID of the role is known hence other attributes are optional.
name: role

account.description: The account associated with the role. For example, can be a cross-account role, different from the user or group account, granting access within this account.

policy.description: Describes details of a policy associated with the role.

privileges.description: List of privileges assigned to a role.

programmatic_credentials.description: Details about the programmatic credential (API keys, access tokens, certificates, etc) associated with the role.

resources.description: Resources that the role applies to.

session.description: The session where the role is active. Some roles may be temporary and expire when the session expires.
